nasb.text: I pursued my enemies and overtook them, And I did not turn back until they were consumed.

esv.text: I pursued my enemies and overtook them, and did not turn back till they were consumed.

cnv.text: 我追趕仇敵，把他們追上； 不消滅他們，我必不歸回。

ccb.text: 我追赶仇敌直到追上， 不消灭他们决不回头。

csbs.text: 我追赶我的仇敌，并要追上他们； 我不灭绝他们绝不返回。
